/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/logistic_regression.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/logistic_regression.dir/logistic_regression.cpp.o -o logistic_regression  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/rocm-7.2.4/lib ../../libmlx.a -ldl -lpthread /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/liblapack.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libblas.so ../../mlx/io/libgguflib.a ../../mlx/backend/rocm/libmlx_rocm_kernels.a /opt/rocm-7.2.4/lib/libamdhip64.so /opt/rocm-7.2.4/lib/librocblas.so.5.2.70204 /opt/rocm-7.2.4/lib/libhiprand.so /opt/rocm-7.2.4/lib/libhiprtc.so /opt/rocm-7.2.4/lib/libhipblaslt.so
